title: narcissus stellatus var. totus-albus
intro: Narcissus stellatus var. totus-albus is a variety of the stellate-leaved narcissus plant, known for its pure white, star-shaped flowers and strong, onion-like fragrance. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Narcissus stellatus var. totus-albus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
